# Puzzle

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Puzzle;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Puzzle { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
component, module, part, piece

## Categories
development, gaming
